temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A bald man in a dark, hooded robe screams in agony as he is violently thrown backward by a powerful, swirling magical force. His face is contorted in pain, and he is surrounded by a dark, misty environment. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a scene of intense conflict and supernatural power, showing a character being overwhelmed by an unseen force.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Agonized screaming. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, explosive sound effect accompanies the man's fall, followed by a low, ominous hum.)
(00:02-00:07) A silhouetted figure in a long, dark robe stands on a rocky outcrop, looking down at a vast, dark sea. The water is agitated with glowing, electrical currents and swirling mist, creating a chaotic and otherworldly scene. The figure holds a dark, ornate staff. (Storyline: This scene introduces a mysterious, powerful being who seems to be the source of the magical chaos. Their position on the high ground suggests they are in control of the situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A deep, rumbling sound effect is paired with the crackling and splashing of the magical sea.)
